title: feuilleea ruiziana
intro: Feuilleea ruiziana, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant native to China that belongs to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Feuilleea ruiziana include alleviating menstrual cramps, relieving symptoms of menopause, and promoting overall women's health. Feuilleea ruiziana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support reproductive health and reduce the risk of certain health conditions.
